steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The first sentence asserts that resins play "several important roles in maintaining the health of conifers and various other kinds of trees." The second sentence describes one specific role — sealing wounds to block insects and fungi. The blank introduces that specific illustration.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
The logical relationship is example. The blank needs a transition signaling that what follows is one instance of the several roles just mentioned.
  • Choice A — For example,: signals a specific instance of a general claim, so fits — sealing wounds is one of the several important roles. ✓
  • Choice B — However,: signals contrast, but sealing wounds doesn't contradict the claim about important roles — it illustrates it. ✗
  • Choice C — Regardless,: signals that something is true despite a stated obstacle, but no obstacle is mentioned in the first sentence. ✗
  • Choice D — Next,: signals the next step in a sequence, but the wound-sealing detail isn't a sequential step — it's an example. ✗
A is correct.
